_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: Normalized AF spectra from B6 and NF1 quadricep muscles showed significantly different means (p < 0.05 between ~450 and 720 nm). NF1 DR spectra showed a more pronounced absorption feature between 500 and 600 nm
details: Quadriceps muscle showed significantly different AF spectra means (p < 0.05 between ~450 and 720 nm) and DR spectra with more pronounced absorption feature between 500-600 nm compared to controls
